description: Community History Archives — digitized local newspapers, records, photographs, yearbooks, and more. Free public access via community partnerships.
notes: Iowa list is partial (~200 of 263 known entries — fetcher truncation). Some institutions appear twice under both domains (historyarchives.online and advantage-preservation.com). No public API; web UI only.
